info.title: EQXPay API
info.description: EQX v2.5 staging API for admin, liquidity-provider, and integrator operations.

market.description: Market code for the offramp corridor (e.g. KE, NG)

source_asset.description: Source crypto asset symbol (e.g. USDC, USDT)

source_amount.description: Amount of source asset to convert (decimal string)

beneficiary_id.description: Beneficiary ID to receive the payout

quote_id.description: Quote ID to commit into a transaction

beneficiary_id.description: Beneficiary ID to receive the payout

otp_token.description: OTP token for step-up authentication if required

user_id.description: User ID to add as a member

role.description: Role to assign to the member
New role to assign to the member

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp for the invitation

settlement_time.description: instant when same-day, T+N for deferred settlement (e.g. T+1)

amount.description: Amount in minor currency units (e.g. MWK tambala)

metadata.description: Arbitrary integrator metadata preserved in all webhook payloads

status.description: Canonical status: created | pending | processing | successful | failed | expired | refunded | reversed

payment_instruction.description: Provider payment instruction (e.g. USSD string, STK reference); null when provider is purely async

amount.description: Amount in minor currency units (e.g. MWK tambala)

description.description: Human-readable description shown on checkout page

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata forwarded to the bound collection

logo_url.description: HTTPS URL to the integrator logo shown on the checkout page

primary_color.description: Hex color override for the checkout card primary accent (e.g. #FF5733)

merchant_name.description: Snapshotted from partner account display name at session creation

session_token.description: Opaque checkout session token (64 hex chars)

customer.description: Rail-specific customer fields; must satisfy the rail capability customer_fields

amount.description: Refund amount in minor units; must equal the original collection amount (v1 full refunds only)

status.description: Refund status: requested | pending | successful | failed

resolved_at.description: Set on successful or failed transition

expires_in_minutes.description: Second-factor challenge expiry time in minutes

user_id.description: User ID to send the OTP to

challenge_id.description: OTP challenge ID returned from the request endpoint
